category_sources: Official/package metadata identifies Cheops as a chess opponent simulator.
source_facts.description says CHEss OPponent Simulator; source_facts.homepage is the official Cheops page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cheops; source_facts.description expands the project as CHEss OPponent Simulator.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best available documentation surface; no dedicated official docs were found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official distribution appears to be via source archive at source_facts.source-archive, with no official source-control repository identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a chess opponent simulator; current_curation.tags includes cli.
